# AI4MT-experiment

This repository contains the results of the experiments with the AI4MT framework:

* Folder [experiments/mr\_inference\_experiment](./experiments/mr_inference_experiment) contains both the gotten programs generated by the MR inference task and the models (and its execution traces) used to analyse their semantic validy. It also contains the artefacts (Python Notebooks) and analysis results for MR similarity, complexity and comparison with human-crafter MRs.
* Folder [experiments/follow\_ups\_experiment](./experiments/follow_ups_experiment) contains the follow-up models generated for the case studies (data centres, autonomous vehicles, DFAs), along with detailed statistics.
